name: dev-token
description: Generate a dev JWT for packagerepo (1yr, all scopes)

options.name: offline
options.help: Generate token locally via openssl (no server needed)

steps.command: TOKEN=$(curl -fsSL -X POST {opt.repo}/auth/dev-token -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"sub":"{opt.sub}","scopes":["read","write","admin"],"exp_hours":{opt.hours}}' | grep -o '"token":"[^"]*"' | cut -d'"' -f4); echo "$TOKEN" > {token_file}; echo "$TOKEN"

SECRET='dev-secret-key'; EXP=$(($(date +%s) + {opt.hours} * 3600)); HDR=$(printf '{"alg":"HS256","typ":"JWT"}' | openssl base64 -e -A | tr '+/' '-_' | tr -d '='); PAY=$(printf '{"sub":"{opt.sub}","scopes":["read","write","admin"],"exp":%d}' "$EXP" | openssl base64 -e -A | tr '+/' '-_' | tr -d '='); SIG=$(printf '%s.%s' "$HDR" "$PAY" | openssl dgst -sha256 -hmac "$SECRET" -binary | openssl base64 -e -A | tr '+/' '-_' | tr -d '='); TOKEN="$HDR.$PAY.$SIG"; echo "$TOKEN" > {token_file}; echo "$TOKEN"
